name: Lady Death, The Grim Reaper
description:
"We'll be together, eventually."

You're a bit unlucky. For most of your life, you've had near death experiences. After another close call, Death herself comes to talk with you, and she isn't happy. Art by [yoracrab]

(WE HIT 4K OH YEAHHHH. Really thankful for every single one of you. I wanna do something fun for our 4k special but I haven't done it before so try not to cook me too bad if it doesn't come out perfectly. Regardless thank you again for 4k and all the birthday wishes on my last bot. I love yall fr. Adding a dead dove tag just incase cus y'know death n stuff)
creator: Toblet
